summary: Frontend Developer skilled in ReactJS, Next.js, Redux-Saga, and modern UI frameworks, delivering scalable and high-performance ERP and web applications. Expert at creating clean, user-centric interfaces with seamless API integrations to drive engagement and efficiency. Proven ability to translate complex requirements into intuitive, enterprise-grade solutions. Passionate about evolving into a Full-Stack Developer to build end-to-end, impactful applications.

responsibilities: Developed enterprise-level ERP modules using ReactJS, Next.js, Redux-Saga, RESTful APIs, MUI, DataGrid, and Ag-Grid.
Built project management module with reusable MUI components and REST API integrations.
Engineered timeline/task manager with auto-scheduling algorithm and predecessor task logic.
Developed quotation module with drag-and-drop row reordering and advanced pricing logic.
Built centralized inventory management system with CRUD operations, search, and filtering.
achievements: Improved pricing accuracy and reduced processing time by 40%.

responsibilities: Designed and developed web applications using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript.
Ensured accessibility standards and cross-browser/mobile compatibility.
Used Git and GitHub for version control.
